approved_control.confirmed_meaning: Chat confirms the target; JSON files are the only official control facts; registries provide internal method and workflow keys; guards validate JSON schema plus registry consistency; runtime uses using-control-json and writes only progress/status/report files; verifier decides whether completion can be claimed.
required_answer_path: state transition that makes the result true
what_is_not_enough_avoided: Markdown templates retained as official control inputs
JSON sidecars while Markdown remains authoritative
runtime self-claiming done without verifier permission

required_steps.transition: initial Markdown-control dependency surface is retired from official guard/compiler/runtime inputs
evidence: tests rejecting legacy Markdown official input

required_steps.transition: observable target state exists as a verified JSON-only control run
